name: aitoolbox-knowledge-skills
description: Compact knowledge-cli workflow skills: knowledge-update, knowledge-get, and knowledge-refresh.

interface.shortDescription: Three concise skills for knowledge-cli update, query, and governance workflows
interface.longDescription: Provides knowledge-update, knowledge-get, and knowledge-refresh skills with embedded lesson/issue actions and periodic governance checks for low-token, exact-first knowledge operations.
defaultPrompt: Use knowledge-get to resolve this entity and apply relevant lessons.
Run knowledge-refresh to audit migration, contract, and docs-code parity.
